---
title: "Jie Geng"
image: "files/profile_pic.PNG"
about:
  template: jolla
  links:
    - icon: envelope
      href: mailto:jigeng@ucsd.edu
    - icon: linkedin
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/jie-geng-901bb1378/
---

MS in Business Analytics, UC San Diego

This website hosts my resume, projects, and coursework for MGTA 495.
